1.title: Test Note
1.content:
NOTE TITLE: ### [[$1|← Parent]]

📘 A *Map of Contents (MoC)* is a landing page for an area of study. It contains backlinks to other pages, organized by category. Most often these backlink to other MoCs–once you hit the narrowest topic, it becomes a Table of Contents for documents related to that topic.

> [!note]
> A backlink has the syntax `[[Backlink|Display Text]]`.
>
> With this in mind, this working example [[MoC - Grimoire|Display Text]], will take you back to the MoC for the Grimorie's tutorial.

This composition results in a drill-in hierarchy from the widest topics to the narrowest topics.

e.g.

| Wide Topic | Narrow Topic    | Narrower Topic |
| ---------- | --------------- | -------------- |
| Psychology | Neurodivergence |                |
| Psychology | Love Languages  |                |
| React      | Hooks           | useEffect()    |
| React      | Hooks           | useMemo()      |
| and so on… |                 |                |

> [!example] Try it out!
> Let's get a feel for how MoCs allow us to navigate without opening a single folder in the file explorer. Before you move on, try to navigate from the [[Table of Contents]] back to this page, without using the Introduction link.
>
> If you open the Table of Contents, you'll see that there's a category called Diátaxis. Click it to navigate to the [[MoC - Diátaxis|Diátaxis]] MoC for our Application, Field Analyzer. At this level, the MoC aligns with the Diátaxis quadrant based technical writing framework.

NOTE TITLE: [[Work Analyzer Performance OKR Review]]

METADATA:{"created":"2025/08/01 10:47:16","modified":"2025/08/04 16:07:19"}

NOTE BLOCK CONTENT:

## Tags: #work-analyzer #okr
---
## ![:dart:](https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/14.0/apple-medium/1f3af.png) Purpose:
- Why am I here? (If unclear, write what you *hope* to gain):
	- We need to pay attention to page load times as a team. Deere wants to see these load times speed up.

## ![:card_index_dividers:](https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/14.0/apple-medium/1f5c2-fe0f.png) Topics & Key Points:
| Topic                             | Key Point or Decision                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Why It Matters to Me (optional)            |
| --------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| Work Analyzer Current Performance | We need to profile how quickly the UI *and then* Data loads. How long does the SPA take to load, how long does the API take to respond.                                                                                                                                            | Deere has an OKR to speed up page loads    |
| Filters                           | Filters are a separate endpoint to call after you get your Pivot data (from `/pivots`). Pivots works in GUIDs. To be able to Filter the `<DataGrid />` you need to request from `/pivots/filter-list` to match pivot GUID to *name*. This allows users to then filter off *names*. |                                            |
| OKRs                              | Load time should be under a second for the UI, data load should be 25% less than it currently is.                                                                                                                                                                                  | We're expected to try and meet these goals |
## ![:bulb:](https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/14.0/apple-medium/1f4a1.png) Insights or Ideas:

## ![:white_check_mark:](https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/14.0/apple-medium/2705.png) Actions Assigned to Me:
- [ ] __Action:__ 
	- __Due__:
	- __Next Step:__ 

## ![:rocket:](https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/14.0/apple-medium/1f680.png) My One Contribution:
- Did I ask a question, share insight, or raise a blocker? 
    - [x] Yes 
    - [ ] No

## ![:brain:](https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/14.0/apple-medium/1f9e0.png) Brain Parking Lot (For Random Thoughts):
-    SPA optimization is not fun lol, important, but really boring
	- How could I orient my mental to find optimizations to be more fun?

## ![:stopwatch:](https://a.slack-edge.com/production-standard-emoji-assets/14.0/apple-medium/23f1-fe0f.png) Post-Meeting Summary (1 sentence):
What do I need to remember or do next?


---
